#  Delete an RFI in Portfolio Financials 
#####  Legacy
This information is intended for accounts with [Portfolio Financials](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/) product in Procore. Please reach out to your Procore point of contact for more information.
##  Background 
The RFIs page in the Bid Room is a powerful tool that allows you to manage RFIs from your vendors and keep information consistent across all bidders. If an RFI was posted by mistake, or is not relevant, it can be deleted.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions** :
    * 'Limited' access to the project or higher.  
_Note:_ Users with 'Limited' access must be on the Bid Room Team for the project.
  * **Additional Information** :
    * Deleted RFIs can be restored later if needed.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the **Bid Room** you want to manage RFIs for.
  2. Click the **RFIs** tab.
  3. Click the RFI that you want to delete.
  4. Click **Delete this question**.  
  
![Delete Rfi](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/3c0a4fb26aa58f4f5622c8f32c88f164/ee70ba3a59904124cb8abec24e115f44/delete-rfi.png?fm=webp)  
  
_Note:_ The RFI can be deleted by clicking **Restore**.


## See Also
  * [Portfolio Financials - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/permissions)
  * [Restore a Deleted RFI in Portfolio Financials](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/tutorials/restore-a-deleted-rfi-in-portfolio-financials)
  * [Edit an RFI in Portfolio Financials](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/tutorials/edit-an-rfi-in-portfolio-financials)
title: Delete an RFI in Portfolio Financials
description: How to delete an RFI that was posted in a Bid Room in Portfolio Financials.
